title: EventBody
description: A single event object in the Inspector v1 track request body (plain, no encryption). type must be 'event'.

apiKey.description: The Inspector API key passed to the constructor.

appName.description: Application name. Empty string if not provided.

libVersion.description: SDK library version. Plain SemVer string, no suffix.

libPlatform.description: SDK platform/language identifier (e.g. node, ruby, python, go).

anonymousId.description: Caller-supplied streamId, or empty string if none provided.

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp with millisecond precision.

publicEncryptionKey.description: P-256 public key in hex. Present only when provided at constructor time.

eventProperties.description: Extracted schema — array of plain property objects.

avoFunction.description: true if sent via _avoFunctionTrackSchemaFromEvent (Codegen path); false for trackSchemaFromEvent.

eventId.description: Avo Codegen event ID. Must be null when avoFunction is false.

eventHash.description: Avo Codegen event hash. Must be null when avoFunction is false.
